context: You are generating or enriching entries for the Spanish sentences collection.
Work only on the requested workflow step.
outputRequirements: Follow the active step's field rules exactly.
rules: Write natural Spanish and natural English.
Omit optional fields when they add no value.

steps.title: Split Into Sentence Units
steps.goal: Split raw Spanish text into natural sentence units before later sentence creation.
inputContract: The request provides a raw Spanish blob, passage, or messy text.
Return only a JSON array of clean Spanish sentence-unit strings in order.
instructions: Do not translate in this step.
Prefer natural sentence boundaries over overly fine splitting.

steps.title: Create Sentence Units
steps.goal: Create Spanish sentence entries with full-line Spanish and English, without chunking unless explicitly requested.
inputContract: The request may provide already-separated Spanish sentences, ideas, grammar targets, categories, scenarios, or a list from the split step.

fieldRules.description: Natural English translation of the full sentence.
Optional learner notes. Omit when unnecessary.

instructions: Do not add `chunks` unless the request explicitly asks for chunking in the same pass.
Keep the output natural and learner-friendly.

steps.title: Add Chunks
steps.goal: Add learner-friendly chunks to existing Spanish sentence entries as a dedicated later pass.
inputContract: The request provides sentence entries that already contain `es` and `en`.
Return sentence-entry objects with chunk enrichment.
preserveRules: Preserve existing `es` and `en` unless the request explicitly asks for corrections.

fieldRules.description: Chunk text exactly as it appears in the sentence.
Short learner-friendly English rendering of the chunk.
Referenced Spanish terms for that chunk.

instructions: Keep chunks ordered and faithful to the sentence surface form.
Use refs only for meaningful Spanish terms actually present in the chunk.
Prefer chunking that helps a learner read the sentence naturally.

prompts.details: Create sentence entries from already-separated Spanish sentences.
Split raw Spanish text into sentence units before later sentence creation.
Create beginner-friendly sentence entries using the provided Spanish words.
Create sentence entries from the provided Spanish sentence ideas.
Create sentence entries that practice the provided grammar points.
Create sentence entries in the provided categories.
Create sentence entries for the provided real-world scenario.
